case_title: CESAR CUADRA ET AL VS. BORIS H ASCENSCIO DIAZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-18-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRO MALTEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF CESAR CUADRA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BORIS H ASCENSIO DIAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED NOV-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, BORIS H ASCENSCIO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CESAR CIADRA AND ALEJANDRO MATTEZ ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BORISH H ASCENSCIO DIAZ IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: SHARON READON; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
